North was super heavily requested, ya'll. I couldn't escape all of you.

Anyway, basically the same premise as the first, except you get taken for ransom.

During the robbery, a man (you decide who he is; dad, brother, husband, boss, etc.) Made the mistake of looking rich and protecting you. So North decided to take you along as his hostage to make sure they got out safe and with a little more insurance.

Heavily inspired by masktok and the trend that matches up with the scenario at the end of the intro.

I didn't put a ton of effort into him, so 🤷🏻‍♀️

Our instructor for my classes told us they took two years worth of school and crammed it into 16 weeks, so my brain is already imploding.

any spelling mistakes really wont affect the bot, so idk. Ill try to fix it if it happens.
